Classic Mac icon archives — bitmap 32x32 ICN# era

Clawmachine-fit: S. Bitmap icon pedigree. Already have retro-kare-classic-mac-icons plugin — this adds source-material proof and additional breadth.

Credits: Macintosh Repository, Eclectic Light (Howard Oakley), Bumbershoot Software, Apple Fandom Wiki, 99% Invisible.. Internal non-commercial fair-use research reference. Do not redistribute.
